subtitle: House, BBQ, and invited guests
joinUsParagraph: On May 9th, the RIVI will be doing exactly what it does best: start easy, eat well, refill glasses, and see how far the evening wants to go. We begin at home, and if the energy is still there later on, the city is welcome to make a guest appearance.
practicalInfoParagraph: A few sleeping spots are available. If you're coming from Lippstadt, heading back later is also totally fine. So yes, the ending stays flexible - officially we're on from 5 PM to 11 PM, unofficially the vibe will decide the rest.
soundsParagraph: Expect relaxed house with enough groove for long conversations, spontaneous kitchen dance floors, and that moment when everyone realizes it got late a lot faster than planned.
foodParagraph: The grill will not just be there for decoration: there will be salads, burgers, and bratwurst, so please arrive appropriately hungry.
drinksParagraph: Drinks will of course be cold, stocked, and ready for a proper evening. If at some point the big question becomes whether water, wine, or one last nightcap is the right move, we will find an excellent answer together.
lookingForward: Looking forward to celebrating with you. For some of you this may be the last 30th birthday for quite a while, so we should probably treat the occasion with the appropriate respect.
homepageSubtitle: 30 years of Richard. Same vibe, new round.
homepageWelcome: Come by, bring your appetite, and feel the vibe.
storyIntro: At the RIVI, we'd rather turn a birthday into a genuinely good evening than a stiff event - with music, people you actually want to see, and enough time to get pleasantly stuck in conversation.
storyRIVI: RIVI remains what it has always been: Richard plus Ivonne, a running joke with its own address, and the kind of place where 'we'll only stop by for a bit' rarely stays true for long.
storyVienna: For the 30th, that means grill on, drinks cold, house on the speakers, and the door open for everyone who feels like a relaxed, lovely evening with just enough potential to escalate gracefully.
storyDusseldorf: We start on Saturday, May 9th 2026, from 5 PM at Paulusplatz in Dusseldorf and see together whether the night stays cozy at ours or eventually drifts into the city.
storyConclusion: In short: come by, raise a glass with me, and let's celebrate this birthday the way the RIVI deserves - relaxed, warm, and with very solid timing.
upcomingEventsDescription: We're celebrating Richy's 30th at the RIVI with grilled food, salads, burgers, bratwurst, drinks, and relaxed house vibes. A few sleeping spots are available too, and whether we head into the city later will be up to the evening itself.

firstVisitModal.title: Welcome to the Vibe
firstVisitModal.description: Turn on the music and start the 30th in the right mood?
